target_revision.description: TargetRevision is the revision number of the ReplicaSet to roll back to. If not specified, rolls back to the previous revision.

RollbackDeploymentParams.title: Rollback Deployment Params
RollbackDeploymentParams.description: RollbackDeploymentParams contains parameters for the rollback_deployment action. Rolls back a deployment by reverting to a previous replicaset.
